*Plots*

* Exactly like the paper*
[X] Produce the sample sizes table in html as well.


[X] 2001 District
[X] 2001 No District
[X] 2011 District
[X] 2011 No District

[X] Joined No District
[X] Joined No District.


## The Map for how I want to procede.

2001
Exactly as the paper.
*Different Matching Specifications*
1. Matching only for parents from -5 to -1
2. Matching everyone from -5 to -1 to 1 and 10.

*Different Sample Specifications*
1. *Not* conditioning head of house, partner, and child.
2. Conditioning only on the Married Sample.


2011
Exactly as the paper.

Joined
Exactly as the paper.
